synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-19278 Important: Oracle Linux 7 firefox security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-19278

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-19278.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
firefox-140.4.0-4.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/firefox-140.4.0-4.0.1.el7_9.src.rpm
